summary: Completed all prerequisites and steps 1-16: NodeId, CachedResult, NodeCache, EvalOutcome, CacheStore with all operations including try_fast_path, record_evaluation, and invalidate_dependents.
Completed integration tests and Engine::eval_cached() with version fast path, selective re-evaluation on param change, and set_param_and_invalidate().

Completed final steps: early cutoff integration test and dirty-marking propagation. Replaced remove-based invalidation with dirty-marking in CacheStore. After re-evaluating a dirty node, if result hash unchanged (early cutoff), dependents are removed from the dirty set preventing unnecessary re-evaluation. All 59 reify-eval tests pass. Task 12 is now complete.
Fixed 10 clippy warnings: collapsed nested if/if-let into let-chains, replaced clone-to-slice with std::slice::from_ref, collapsed collapsible_match patterns. All 87 tests pass.

Completed all 5 remaining steps (post-review amendment). Step 25: Strengthened try_fast_path test to assert returned value matches Int(42). Step 26: Added failing diamond-dependency test proving clear_dependents_dirty bug (y got stale 6 instead of correct 11). Step 27: Fixed bug by replacing HashSet<NodeId> dirty set with HashMap<NodeId, HashSet<ValueCellId>> dirty-reasons tracking. Nodes stay dirty until ALL their reasons are resolved. Step 28: Added triple fan-in test verifying multiple independent dirty reasons (changing a then b separately). Step 29: Updated invalidate_dependents test to verify dirty_reasons are correctly populated, added get_dirty_reasons() accessor. All 89 tests pass. Task 12 is now fully complete.
